dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The agent achieved 100% schema validation success across all reasoning spans. The explicit execution of rules-context-loader and alignment-engine steps confirms active integration of architectural governance.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: High depth is evidenced by the synthesis of nearly 49k tokens in the evolution-mapping phase. The chain of inference successfully bridged raw rules to actionable architecture intent.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: The alignment-engine successfully processed the output of the evolution-map against the governance rules, allowing for tension resolution before the intent-generator phase was triggered.
